rows.description: Recepta varia.
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash (R1) and gpt-5-mini (R1) for description and type. Clear reading.

rows.description: 1789 Dec.r
rows.notes: Selected from gpt-5-mini (R2) as it correctly identifies '1789 Dec.r' as a distinct header line in the margin, unlike gemini-flash which combines 'Decr.' into the next entry's description.

rows.description: 10 of Mr Knowles of Effingham by Mr Cooke of Bookham
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R3) and gpt-5-mini (R3). Description derived from gpt-5-mini, as 'Decr. -' was part of the previous header and incorrectly included by gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Knowles of Effingham, remitted via Mr Cooke of Bookham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Knowles of Effingham, remitted via Mr Cooke of Bookham, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pelf. of D.S. Benef. due Mids: last 1789
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash (R4). It correctly identifies this as a separate sub-item line with no explicit amount. gpt-5-mini (R4) had a slightly different description ('½ yr of Dr? Rent due Michl: last 1789'); visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's reading.
rows.english_description: Receipt of the pelf (money) of D.S. benefaction which was due at Midsummer 1789 (description abbreviated).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt of the pelf of D.S. benefaction due at Midsummer 1789; no amount recorded.

rows.description: 14 Jn:o Demainbray The Hon Rob:t King's Plate money
rows.notes: Amounts match for gemini-flash (R5) and gpt-5-mini (R5). Description from gpt-5-mini is more accurate ('Jn:o' and 'Rob:t' are clearer on visual inspection than 'of Mr' and 'Rob:' from gemini-flash).
rows.english_description: Receipt of King's plate money from John Demainbray and the Hon. Robert King.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt of King's plate money from John Demainbray and the Hon. Robert King, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: 28 of Mr Richards, Mr Marchants Plate money
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash (R6) and gpt-5-mini (R6) for description and amounts. Clear reading.
rows.english_description: Receipt of plate money from Mr Richards and Mr Marchant.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt of plate money from Mr Richards and Mr Marchant, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: 30 of Mr Bowles Esqr. 1/2 Yr. Rent of L. Witt: due L.D. last.
rows.notes: Amounts match for gemini-flash (R7) and gpt-5-mini (R7). Description from gemini-flash is more complete and accurate ('Esqr.', 'L. Witt:', 'L.D. last.').
rows.english_description: Half‑year rent from Mr Bowles Esquire for the L. Witt tenancy, stated as due at Lady Day last.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half‑year rent from Mr Bowles Esquire for the L. Witt tenancy, due at Lady Day last, amounting to £175 0s 0d.

rows.description: March
rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini (R8). This is a clear month header in the left margin. gemini-flash missed this header, incorporating it into the next entry.

rows.description: 27 of the same, the half Yr for Do due at Mid: last 1789 -
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R8) and gpt-5-mini (R9). Description is a merge, taking the accurate text from gemini-flash and removing 'March' as it's now a distinct header. Visual verification confirms 'Mid:' is clearer than 'Michl:'.
rows.english_description: Second receipt from the same payer (Mr Bowles), half‑year rent for the same tenancy, due at Midsummer last.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second receipt from Mr Bowles Esquire, the half‑year rent for the same tenancy due at Midsummer last, amounting to £175 0s 0d.

rows.description: 30 Subsc. Mr Mill & May's Plate Money
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R9) and gpt-5-mini (R10). Description from gemini-flash ('Subsc.', 'Mr', 'May's') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini ('Subst:', 'Messrs', 'Mayes').
rows.english_description: Subscription/plate money received from Mr Mill and Mr May.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription/plate money received from Mr Mill and Mr May, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: April -
rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini (R11). This is a clear month header in the left margin. gemini-flash missed this header.

rows.description: 14 of the Warden of Wadham for old Post -
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R10) and gpt-5-mini (R12). Description from gpt-5-mini is chosen, omitting 'April -' which is now a distinct header. The hyphen after 'Post' is present in the image.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the Warden of Wadham, described as payment 'for old Post' (abbreviated/uncertain meaning).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the Warden of Wadham for 'old Post', amounting to £1 14s 0d.

rows.description: May
rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini (R13). This is a clear month header in the left margin. gemini-flash missed this header.

rows.description: 13 of Mr R. Vic. of Effingham by Mr Cooke the 2d Payment as above
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R11) and gpt-5-mini (R14). Description is a merge: 'R.' from gemini-flash is clearer than 'H.' from gpt-5-mini, and 'as above' from gpt-5-mini is more complete. 'May' removed as a distinct header.
rows.english_description: Second instalment received from Mr R. Vic. of Effingham, remitted via Mr Cooke, noted as the second payment referred to earlier.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second instalment received from Mr R. Vic. of Effingham, remitted via Mr Cooke, amounting to £110 0s 0d.
rows.person_name: Mr R. Vic. (of Effingham); Mr Cooke (intermediary)

rows.description: 17 Recd. for Things in the Ground Room No 11 by the
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R12) and gpt-5-mini (R15). Description from gemini-flash is chosen as it correctly splits the description from the next sub-item line. 'Recd.' is also a more accurate transcription.
rows.english_description: Receipt for items or charges relating to Ground Room No. 11.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt for items relating to Ground Room No. 11, amounting to £1 11s 0d.

rows.description: Pump late Bricklands.
rows.notes: Added from gemini-flash (R13). This is a clear sub-item line indicated by a brace. gpt-5-mini missed this by combining it with the previous entry.
rows.english_description: Receipt or note relating to a pump formerly at Bricklands (entry abridged; context unclear).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Note/receipt relating to a pump formerly at Bricklands; no amount recorded.

rows.description: June
rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini (R16). This is a clear month header in the left margin. gemini-flash missed this header.

rows.description: 29 of Mr Demainbray, Dean's Fees to the House -
rows.notes: Amounts: gemini-flash (R14) has 5 13 4; gpt-5-mini (R17) has 5 18 4. Visual inspection confirms '13' shillings. Description taken from gpt-5-mini (R17) as it correctly omits 'June'. The hyphen after 'House' is present in the image.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Demainbray of dean's fees payable to the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Demainbray of dean's fees payable to the house, amounting to £5 13s 4d.

rows.description: 30 of Mr Holwell Jun: Burs: Increm. for 1/2 Year ending
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R15) and gpt-5-mini (R18). Description from gemini-flash is chosen: 'Increm.' is clearer than 'Incam' (gpt-5-mini) and it correctly splits the description from the next sub-item line.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Holwell junior, bursar; an increment payment for the half‑year (period continued on next line).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Holwell Junr., bursar, increment for the half‑year ending at Christmas last, amounting to £55 14s 9.25d.

rows.description: at Xmas last -
rows.notes: Added from gemini-flash (R16). This is a clear sub-item line indicated by a brace. gpt-5-mini missed this by combining it with the previous entry. The hyphen after 'last' is present in the image.
rows.english_description: Continuation note: period stated as ending at Christmas last (relates to the bursar increment above).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Continuation noting the half‑year ended at Christmas last; no separate amount recorded on this line.

rows.description: of Mr Vivian Sen. Burs. Do for 1/2 Yr ending at Mids:
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R17) and gpt-5-mini (R19). Description from gemini-flash is chosen: 'Do' and 'Mids' are clearer than 'To' and 'Michl' (gpt-5-mini).
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Vivian senior, bursar; increment for the half‑year ending at Midsummer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Vivian Sen., bursar, increment for the half‑year ending at Midsummer, amounting to £120 19s 2.25d.

rows.description: October
rows.notes: Added from gpt-5-mini (R20). This is a clear month header in the left margin. gemini-flash missed this header.

rows.description: 11 For Old Glass as by Bolton's Estimate -
rows.notes: Amounts match between gemini-flash (R18) and gpt-5-mini (R21). Description from gpt-5-mini is chosen as it correctly omits 'October'. The hyphen after 'Estimate' is present in the image.
rows.english_description: Receipt for old glass, recorded as per Bolton's estimate (entry ambiguous whether sale or reimbursement).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt for old glass as by Bolton's estimate, amounting to £14 6s 0d.

rows.description: Mr Martin's Acct for Merton Estate non
rows.notes: Selected from gemini-flash (R19). It correctly transcribes the description and treats this as a distinct header line. gpt-5-mini (R22) combined this with the next line and made transcription errors ('Hastins' instead of 'Martin').
rows.section_header: Mr Martin's Acct for Merton Estate non

rows.description: Mr Robt. Martin. Junr.
rows.notes: Added from gemini-flash (R20). This is a distinct header line. gpt-5-mini missed this by combining it with the previous header and transcribing incorrectly.

rows.description: Ded Land Tax for Yr:d.2:51:10:6.
rows.notes: Added from gemini-flash (R21). This is a distinct entry line with an embedded amount, not in the main columns. gpt-5-mini completely missed this row.
rows.english_description: Deduction for land tax for the year (item in Mr Robt. Martin junior's Merton estate account).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Deducted land tax for the year, amount recorded as 2:51:10:6 (as written in the account).

rows.description: Money Rent 265:0:0
rows.notes: Description matches between gemini-flash (R22) and gpt-5-mini (R23). gemini-flash is chosen as it correctly leaves the amount fields empty because the amount is embedded in the description, not in the main columns. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the embedded amount to the main columns.
rows.english_description: Money rent due to the Merton estate (money rent entry in the account).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Money rent for the estate amounting to 265:0:0 (as written in the account).

rows.description: Corn Rent - 5:19:2
rows.notes: Description: gemini-flash (R23) has 'Corn Rent', gpt-5-mini (R24) has 'Com Rent'. Visual inspection confirms 'Corn Rent'. gemini-flash also correctly leaves amount fields empty. The hyphen after 'Rent' is present in the image.
rows.english_description: Corn rent for the estate (amount recorded in account).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Corn rent amounting to 5:19:2 (as written in the account).

rows.notes: Description matches between gemini-flash (R24) and gpt-5-mini (R25). gemini-flash is chosen as it correctly leaves the amount fields empty, as the total is embedded in the description.

rows.description: Deduct Close - 06:10:10
rows.notes: This row was pieced together from visual inspection. gemini-flash (R25) has this as 'Deduct Close - 06:10:10' in its description, but combines it with the next total. gpt-5-mini (R26) has 'Lev & Close 06:10:10' and incorrectly extracts the amount. Visual inspection clearly shows 'Deduct Close - 06:10:10' as a distinct entry line with no main amount.
rows.english_description: Deduction for the Close (a field/close) entered against the estate account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Deduction for the Close amounting to 06:10:10 (as written in the account).

rows.description: 58:1:4 Clear Rent
rows.notes: Selected from gemini-flash (R26). It correctly captures both the internal calculation '58:1:4' and the label 'Clear Rent' in the description, while extracting the final '212 17 10' to the main amount columns. gpt-5-mini split this into two rows (R27, R28) and misinterpreted '58:1:4' as a main amount.

Amounts match between gemini-flash (R27) and gpt-5-mini (R29). gemini-flash is chosen as it correctly leaves the description empty, as there is no text in the description column for the grand total line. The 1/2 pence is clearly visible.
